name: Security Check on Write
description: Scan for hardcoded secrets and dangerous patterns before writing files

then.prompt: Before writing this file, quickly check: Does the content contain any hardcoded secrets (API keys, passwords, tokens, connection strings)? Does it use string-concatenated SQL queries? Does it use eval() with external input? Does it set innerHTML with user-provided content? If any of these are found, flag them and suggest fixes before proceeding.
